samples.xml_description:
<module id="serial2parallel">
    <description>Implement a series-parallel conversion circuit. It receives a serial input signal "din_serial" along with a control signal "din_valid" indicating the validity of the input data. The module operates on the rising edge of the clock signal "clk" and uses a synchronous design. The input din_serial is a single-bit data, and when the module receives 8 input data, the output dout_parallel outputs the 8-bit data(The serial input values are sequentially placed in dout_parallel from the most significant bit to the least significant bit), and the dout_valid is set to 1.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="din_serial">Serial input data.</input>
        <input id="din_valid">Validity signal for input data.</input>
        <output id="dout_parallel" width_description="[7:0]">Parallel output data.</output>
        <output id="dout_valid">Validity signal for the output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="ADD=6'b100000">ADD</parameter>
        <parameter id="SUB=6'b100010">SUB</parameter>
        <parameter id="MULT=6'b011000">MULT</parameter>
        <parameter id="ACC=6'b011100">ACC</parameter>
        <parameter id="NAND=6'b010000">NAND</parameter>
        <parameter id="LT=6'b100111">LT</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="cnt" size="[3:0]">4-bit counter for counting the number of cycles.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="dout" size="[7:0]">8-bit register for storing the output data.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="dout_valid" size="[7:0]">8-bit register for storing the output data.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential>
            <if>
                <condition>
                    <and>
                        <equal>
                            <attribute reference="cnt" select="[3:0]" />
                            <value>4'b1000</value>
                        </equal>
                        <equal>
                            <attribute reference="dout_valid" select="[7:0]" />
                            <value>8'b00000000</value>
                        </equal>
                    </and>
                </condition>
                <then>
                    <non_blocking>
                        <attribute reference="cnt" select="[3:0]" />
                        <operator type="binary">=</operator>
                        <expr>
                            <value>4'b0000</value>
                        </expr>
                    </non_blocking>
                    <non_blocking>
                        <attribute reference="dout" select="[7:0]" />
                        <operator type="binary">=</operator>
                        <expr>
                            <value>8'b00000000</value>
                        </expr>
                    </non_blocking>
                </then>
            </if>
            <else>
                <then>
                    <non_blocking>
                        <attribute reference="cnt" select="[3:0]" />
                        <operator type="binary">=</operator>
                        <expr>
                            <attribute reference="cnt" select="[3:0]" />
                            <operator type="binary">+</operator>
                            <value>4'b0001</value>
                        </expr>
                    </non_blocking>
                </then>
            </else>
        </sequential>
        <sequential>
            <if>
                <condition>
                    <and>
                        <equal>
                            <attribute reference="cnt" select="[3:0]" />
                            <value>4'b1000</value>
                        </equal>
                        <equal>
                            <attribute reference="dout_valid" select="[7:0]" />
                            <value>8'b00000000</value>
                        </equal>
                    </and>
                </condition>
                <then>
                    <non_blocking>
                        <attribute reference="dout" select="[7:0]" />
                        <operator type="binary">=</operator>
                        <expr>
                            <attribute reference="dout" select="[7:0]" />
                            <operator type="binary">+</operator>
                            <value>8'b00000001</value>
                        </expr>
                    </non_blocking>
                    <non_blocking>
                        <attribute reference="dout_valid" select="[7:0]" />
                        <operator type="binary">=</operator>
                        <expr>
                            <value>8'b00000001</value>
                        </expr>
                    </non_blocking>
                </then>
            </if>
            <else>
                <then>
                    <non_blocking>
                        <attribute reference="dout_valid" select="[7:0]" />
                        <operator type="binary">=</operator>
                        <expr>
                            <value>8'b00000000</value>
                        </expr>
                    </non_blocking>
                </then>
            </else>
        </sequential>
        <sequential>
            <if>
                <condition>
                    <and>
                        <equal>
                            <attribute reference="cnt" select="[3:0]" />
                            <value>4'b1000</value>
                        </equal>
                        <equal>
                            <attribute reference="dout_valid" select="[7:0]" />
                            <value>8'b00000000</value>
                        </equal>
                    </and>
                </condition>
                <then>
                    <non_blocking>
                        <attribute reference="dout" select="[7:0]" />
                        <operator type="binary">=</operator>
                        <expr>
                            <attribute reference="din_serial" />
                        </expr>
                    </non_blocking>
                </then>
            </if>
            <else>
                <then>
                    <non_blocking>
                        <attribute reference="dout" select="[7:0]" />
                        <operator type="binary">=</operator>
                        <expr>
                            <attribute reference="dout" select="[7:0]" />
                            <operator type="binary">+</operator>
                            <value>8'b00000001</value>
                        </expr>
                    </non_blocking>
                </then>
            </else>
        </sequential>
    </implementation>
</module>
